channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - remapradio.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for remapradio.com

item.title: This Week at Remap
item.content:encoded:
On Thursday, I will board a plane to hang out in Boston with Rob, Chia, and Rob's dogs. We started streaming in New York because it was (sort of) in-between where all of us lived and New York offered the easiest (though not cheap) options for setting up in a studio that would also, crucially, offer us equipment we did not own. But the prices of those options have gone up, our desire to do in-person streams has gone up, and so we started looking at different options. When Rob ended up in a place larger than the average house, we started to think...okay, what about here? But that takes time, not to mention Rob's house came out of the box a bit more complicated than anticipated, but we're moving into a place where, if all goes according to plan, we'll end up there more often in the months to come, including, hopefully, a really big event in the fall. These are all steps on this journey! A journey that we could not continue to go on without your support.

-pk, who will finish Mina the Hollower on his flight to Boston

  • PODCAST: Sports! (feat: Patrick, Rob)– It's been months since the last Sports!, but don't worry, this one is a banger. We talk about negotiating with a genie over perpetual stadium tickets that guarantee your team will lose, the inability to watch sports and avoid the Trump administration, reactions to the NBA Finals/playoffs, and, yes, we're going to predict the Bears' 2026 wins/losses. Oh, and I reveal a story I've been holding onto for a few weeks, one that had Rob leaping through the monitor.
    • You will hear this podcast tomorrow.
  • STREAM: Dark Scrolls (feat: Janet, Patrick) – Janet and I have already recorded the next episode of Jump Rank Repeat (hint: you'll want to start brushing up on Rare games), but you'll hear that after the July 4th holiday. In the meantime, though, we wanna check out this interesting-looking action/platformer/co-op thing.
  • PODCAST: Remap Radio – We'll be recording this on Wednesday, so excuse us if we're behind the news cycle by the time the podcast is actually released.
  • STREAM: All-Day In-Person Streaming – On Friday and Saturday, you can hang out with us while we play golf games, more golf games, and probably, at some point, some golf games. (We will do a lot more than play golf games.)

If you have any support issues, send details to support@remapradio.com

Patrick Klepek (he/him) is an editor at Remap. In another life, he worked on horror movie sets, but instead, he also runs Crossplay, a newsletter about parenting and video games. You can follow him on Twitter, Threads, Mastodon, and Bluesky.
